title: JustMonikaPaint
description:
This Texture pack adds new ddlc GUI, Paintings and etc, But Mostly Based On Just Monika! 
Bedrock Version will also be available soon.
body:
This Texture Pack adds new Doki Doki Literature Club (Shortly DDLC) Paintings, swords and ui change!
Doesn't require any mods For it to work.
This pack will be updated often! Check Gallery for some of the DDLC paintings and also way more like new vanilla smaller tools, new side shield, new font and so much more also non-ddlc based!
